source_pr.title: *: use std/slices to replace exp/slices
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #45933

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: This PR is a broad mechanical migration from `golang.org/x/exp/slices` to the Go stdlib `slices` across multiple packages/tests. The referenced `slices.SortFunc(...)` change is an API refactor, not a patch-backed flaky stabilization with a concrete failure signature. To avoid misclassifying it as an ordering flake, classify as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Migrate exp/slices usages to stdlib `slices` across packages (API refactor); no concrete flaky signature captured in this case.

evidence: evidence: slices.SortFunc(kvs, func(i, j common.KvPair) int { (br/pkg/lightning/backend/external/writer_test.go)

files: br/pkg/lightning/backend/external/BUILD.bazel, br/pkg/lightning/backend/external/writer_test.go, br/pkg/lightning/backend/local/BUILD.bazel, br/pkg/lightning/backend/local/disk_quota.go, br/pkg/lightning/checkpoints/BUILD.bazel, br/pkg/lightning/checkpoints/checkpoints.go, br/pkg/lightning/importer/BUILD.bazel, br/pkg/lightning/importer/dup_detect_test.go, ddl/ddl.go, executor/executor.go, executor/index_lookup_merge_join.go, executor/sort.go, planner/core/BUILD.bazel, planner/core/optimizer.go, planner/funcdep/BUILD.bazel, planner/funcdep/fast_int_set_test.go, sessionctx/stmtctx/BUILD.bazel, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx.go, statistics/BUILD.bazel, statistics/cmsketch.go, statistics/merge_worker.go, statistics/selectivity.go, store/mockstore/unistore/cophandler/BUILD.bazel, store/mockstore/unistore/cophandler/analyze.go, store/pdtypes/BUILD.bazel, store/pdtypes/region_tree.go, table/temptable/BUILD.bazel, table/temptable/main_test.go
